plugins.name: vantage-peers
plugins.description: Plug-and-play kit for VantagePeers MCP — expert agent, 5 autonomous skills, CLAUDE.md protocol template, .mcp.json config template. Persistent memory, multi-orchestrator messaging, task coordination for agent swarms. — Compatible with Claude Code, Claude Desktop, and Claude.ai web (OAuth 2.1 DCR).
